tasks.title: Wire session scripts to CI parity
tasks.spec: Ensure session-verify.sh runs the same checks CI will run. Add a GitHub Actions workflow .github/workflows/ci.yml that invokes session-verify.sh so local verification == CI verification.
acceptance_criteria: session-verify.sh runs ruff, mypy, pytest for any existing code
.github/workflows/ci.yml exists and invokes the same script
Script exits non-zero on any failure; no silent passes

tasks.title: Bootstrap vmlx Python package skeleton
tasks.spec: Create vmlx/ as an installable Python 3.12 package: pyproject.toml with mlx and mlx-lm deps, __init__.py exposing version, a no-op `vmlx.serve` entrypoint, and a smoke test that imports the package and verifies version string. No runtime features yet — just the skeleton the rest of Phase 0 builds on.
acceptance_criteria: `pip install -e vmlx/` succeeds on macOS arm64 with Python 3.12
`python -c "import vmlx; print(vmlx.__version__)"` prints a valid semver string
`pytest vmlx/tests/` runs and passes at least one assertion
ruff + mypy pass on vmlx/

tasks.title: Baseline single-request MLX inference via mlx-lm
tasks.spec: Implement vmlx.engine.SingleRequestEngine that loads an MLX model via mlx-lm and runs a single generate() call. This is the reference baseline — no batching, no paged cache, no concurrency. All later scheduler work benchmarks against this.
acceptance_criteria: Can load a small MLX model (e.g. mlx-community/Qwen2.5-0.5B-Instruct-4bit) and generate 50 tokens from a prompt
Returns tokens/sec measurement
Integration test marked @pytest.mark.metal passes on M-series Mac
No memory leaks across 10 sequential generations

tasks.title: Benchmark harness comparing engines
tasks.spec: Build vmlx/benchmarks/ tool that runs a fixed workload (N prompts, fixed length) against a named engine implementation and reports: median/P95 TTFT, tokens/sec, peak memory. This is the yardstick for every later vMLX improvement.
acceptance_criteria: `python -m vmlx.benchmarks.run --engine single --model <id> --n 20` produces a JSON report
Report fields: ttft_p50_ms, ttft_p95_ms, tokens_per_sec, peak_rss_mb, total_duration_s
Report is appended to vmlx/benchmarks/history.jsonl for tracking over time

tasks.title: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions endpoint
tasks.spec: FastAPI server exposing /v1/chat/completions and /v1/models, wrapping SingleRequestEngine. Supports streaming (SSE) and non-streaming. Matches OpenAI request/response shape exactly so existing OpenAI SDK clients work unchanged.
acceptance_criteria: `curl` with OpenAI payload returns valid OpenAI response
openai Python SDK pointed at http://localhost:<port>/v1 works end-to-end
SSE streaming produces well-formed delta events ending with [DONE]
/v1/models lists loaded models

tasks.title: Continuous batching scheduler (basic)
tasks.spec: Replace SingleRequestEngine with BatchingEngine that merges in-flight requests each step. Start with naive per-step batching (no paged KV yet). Target: 3x throughput on 8 concurrent requests vs SingleRequestEngine.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark with N=8 concurrent shows throughput_req_per_sec >= 3x baseline
Median TTFT does not regress by more than 20% vs single-request
Correctness: batched output byte-identical to single-request output for same prompt + temperature=0
Stress test: 100 requests over 30 seconds, no deadlocks, no dropped requests

tasks.title: Paged KV cache for unified memory
tasks.spec: Design and implement a block-based KV cache manager adapted for Apple unified memory (no distinct GPU/CPU). See vLLM PagedAttention paper for algorithmic reference (arxiv 2309.06180). Should enable variable sequence lengths in the same batch without padding waste.
acceptance_criteria: Design doc in docs/vmlx/paged-cache.md with block size rationale and benchmarks
Memory efficiency: >80% KV bytes in use vs allocated (vs padded baseline)
Throughput: no regression vs vmlx-005 on same benchmark
Correctness: same byte-identical test as vmlx-005 passes

tasks.title: Prefix caching for shared system prompts
tasks.spec: Detect and reuse KV for shared prompt prefixes across requests (same system prompt, same conversation-history turns). Use content-addressed hashing of token sequences to key the cache. Evict LRU.
acceptance_criteria: Benchmark with shared system prompt shows >= 50% TTFT reduction on prefix-hit
Cache hit rate surfaced in /admin/stats
No correctness regression

tasks.title: vMLX 0.1 public release
tasks.spec: Tag v0.1.0, publish benchmarks comparing vMLX to mlx-lm server, write launch README for vmlx/ including install and usage, and open-source announce (blog or GitHub release notes).
acceptance_criteria: GitHub release v0.1.0 exists with notes
vmlx/README.md has install, quickstart, benchmark results
Public benchmark comparison shows >= 3x throughput advantage vs mlx-lm in at least one scenario

tasks.title: FastAPI gateway scaffold with /health
tasks.spec: Create loom/gateway as a FastAPI app: /health, CORS setup, structured logging, local-binding by default (127.0.0.1). Stub forwarding of /v1/chat/completions to the vMLX backend. No auth yet.
acceptance_criteria: `uvicorn loom.gateway.main:app` starts and /health returns 200
A request to /v1/chat/completions is forwarded to a configured vMLX URL
Binds to 127.0.0.1 by default; env var LOOM_BIND configurable
Tests in loom/gateway/tests/
